title: Render Distance Command
description: This is a simple Fabric mod that allows you to set your render distance via command (up to 128 chunks).
body:
_Thanks for **1000**+ downloads - you guys are awesome!_ **⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️** This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). Due to vanilla limitations, you must install **[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)**, in order to set render distances past 12 chunks with the command.
**Mod Description** _Ever just wanted to set your render distance instantly from chat? Then you came to the right place!_ **Render Distance Command** (also published on **[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/render-distance-command)**) is a client-sided Minecraft mod for the Fabric Loader, that adds the **/renderdistance** command, which sets your current render distance to what ever you want (2 chunks min, 128 chunks max). Here's an example command for setting your render distance to 20 chunks:
/renderdistance 20
Also, as of **v1.0.1** of the mod, there is a new command that allows you to see the currently set render distance. Here's how you would type it in in chat to get your current render distance:
/getcurrentrenderdistance
For a visual of this mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, or check out this mod's **Gallery Tab**. _In the **Gallery Tab**, there are screenshots with a feature from another mod, which is called [Timestamp Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/timestamp-chat), by [Abbie](https://modrinth.com/user/Abbie)._
**Mod Demonstration Video**
**Donation** If you want, you can support me by donating with the link on this page.
